cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby nakreslila [hlp]číslici 2[/hlp] ve stylu digitálního displeje. Vodorovné tahy mají [hlp]60 bodů[/hlp], svislé tahy [hlp]40 bodů[/hlp].
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1" x="20" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b2"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b4"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b5"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b6"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b7"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b8"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b9"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
